question: 3-VIIRS-bird training-label ablation: dense-but-short (6-pass 2024+) vs long-but-sparse (S-NPP all-years) vs stitch (all-years, add sats as available). Serve is fixed 6-pass, so all configs scored on the SAME 6-pass held-out set.
